summary: Iteration 188: DoP Frazionata + SAL/Acconti + Enhanced Conto Lavoro. All 25 backend tests passed after fixing 2 bugs. Frontend verified: CommessaOpsPanel shows 'DoP Frazionate' and 'SAL & Acconti' sections correctly, SettingsPage all 11 tabs render correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: FIXED BUG: dop_frazionata.py line 189 - PDF blocking logic was checking commesse_ops collection instead of commesse collection for C/L data. Fixed to use commessa.get('conto_lavoro', [])
FIXED BUG: sal_acconti.py line 77 - SAL calculation was only checking commesse_ops for C/L data. Fixed to also check commesse collection for backward compatibility
DoP Frazionata: Correctly creates DoP with progressive suffixes (/A, /B, /C), tracks materials from DDTs, blocks PDF generation when C/L items not returned
SAL Calculation: Uses weighted average (ore 50%, fasi 30%, C/L 20%) when C/L exists, or (ore 60%, fasi 40%) when no C/L
Acconto/Fattura: Creates acconto from SAL percentage, generates invoice with proper line items and VAT calculation
Enhanced Conto Lavoro: Rientro endpoint saves certificates, verifica endpoint links cert to commessa_documents for Pulsante Magico

test_credentials.note: Test session cleaned up after testing

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 188 tested DoP Frazionata, SAL/Acconti, and enhanced Conto Lavoro features. Key findings: (1) DoP Frazionata creates DoP with suffixes /A, /B, /C and blocks PDF generation when C/L items have stato != rientrato/verificato. (2) SAL calculation uses weighted average from ore, fasi, and C/L status. (3) Acconto creation and invoice generation work correctly. (4) Two bugs were fixed: dop_frazionata.py and sal_acconti.py were checking wrong collection (commesse_ops instead of commesse) for C/L data. (5) Frontend CommessaOpsPanel shows DoP Frazionate and SAL & Acconti sections correctly. (6) SettingsPage all 11 tabs render correctly after refactoring.

bugs_fixed.issue: PDF blocking logic checked commesse_ops collection for C/L data, but C/L is stored in commesse collection
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed to use commessa.get('conto_lavoro', []) instead of db.commesse_ops.find_one()

bugs_fixed.issue: SAL calculation only checked commesse_ops for fasi and C/L data, missing data stored in commesse collection
bugs_fixed.fix: Added fallback to check commessa collection if commesse_ops doesn't have the data

backend_endpoints.GET /api/commesse/{cid}/sal (with auth): ✓ Returns SAL calculation with all fields

SettingsPage.tabs_visible: ✓ All 11 tabs (Azienda, Banca, Logo, Condizioni, Integrazioni, Certificazioni, Migrazione, Backup, Notifiche, Team, Deploy)
SettingsPage.backup_tab_content: ✓ Shows Backup & Restore Dati with export/import
